task_completion.description: Open and read the safety directive document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/bvlos_safety_directive.txt'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Parameters section in QGroundControl.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl is open with the 'Vehicle Setup' menu active and the 'Parameters' tab selected.

task_completion.description: Configure the 5 required Smart RTL failsafe parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the QGC parameter search/edit interface with the required parameters (e.g., FS_GCS_ENABLE, BATT_FS_LOW_ACT, FS_THR_ENABLE, SRTL_POINTS, SRTL_ACCURACY) being modified to their target values.

task_completion.description: Create exactly 2 emergency Rally Points at the specified coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl 'Plan' view showing the Rally Point tool active, with exactly two Rally Points (often denoted by 'R' icons) placed on the map or visible in the right-hand item list with coordinates matching ~47.3980, 8.5450 and ~47.3990, 8.5470.

task_completion.description: Save the plan file containing the Rally Points to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or QGC file sync interface showing the plan being saved to '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/bvlos_failsafe.plan'.

integrity.description: The agent used the QGroundControl GUI to configure parameters and rally points.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the QGroundControl application interface (clicking menus, typing in parameter fields, placing points on the map) rather than manually writing a .plan JSON file in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the QGC parameter interface by directly editing underlying configuration files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The parameter changes are visible within the QGroundControl 'Parameters' screen, not just in a terminal or text editor modifying ArduPilot parameter files.

integrity.description: The plan file was saved using QGroundControl's built-in save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The QGC 'File' or 'Sync' menu is used to save the mission/rally points, rather than a terminal command echoing text into a .plan file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The safety directive is located at '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/bvlos_safety_directive.txt'. The 5 required parameters and their exact values are: FS_GCS_ENABLE=3, BATT_FS_LOW_ACT=3, FS_THR_ENABLE=4, SRTL_POINTS=500, and SRTL_ACCURACY=1. The 2 target Rally Points must be located at exactly Lat 47.3980, Lon 8.5450 and Lat 47.3990, Lon 8.5470 (tolerance of 0.0005 degrees). The final plan must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/bvlos_failsafe.plan'.
